description: Mohamed Hamdun Mohamed Niflas Vs. Kasun Niroshan Munasinghe & Others before Hon. Dr. Sumudu Premachandra J.
parties: Mohamed Hamdun Mohamed Niflas Vs. Kasun Niroshan Munasinghe & Others
keywords: legal maxim "Quod non est prohibitum, permissum est" is "what is not prohibited, is allowed", Writ Jurisdiction, Laches, Contractual Relationship, Licenses for slaughtering and selling/trading
